results.requirement_text: The system shall allow an administrator to deactivate a user account.

test_cases.title: Deactivate user account by administrator
test_cases.objective: Verify that an administrator can deactivate a user account.
test_cases.technique_used: Manual functional test via UI or API
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Execute the deactivation of a target user account using the administrator capability.
steps.expected_result: The target user account is marked as deactivated/inactive.

test_cases.expected_result: The system deactivates the specified user account, and the account status reflects a deactivated state.
assumptions: An administrator role with permission to deactivate accounts is configured.
A user account exists in an active state prior to the test.

traceability.technique_used: Manual functional test via UI or API

source_basis: allow an administrator to deactivate a user account

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow an administrator to deactivate a user account.

coverage_items.technique_used: Manual functional test via UI or API
coverage_items.rationale: Verify that the system provides the capability for an administrator to deactivate a user account as specified
source_basis: allow an administrator to deactivate a user account
